# SCOPE.CTN

**SCOPE** (SystematiC prOfiling of disease-relevant sPatial nichEs) is a
scalable multi-learning statistical framework that represents tissue
architecture through Cell type-Triad Niches (CTNs), which are
cohort-stable motifs of localized higher-order cell-type interactions.
SCOPE integrates multiple spatial colocalization patterns within a
multi-view learning framework to derive reusable niche vocabularies from
spatially resolved single-cell data.

![SCOPE schematic](reference/figures/SCOPE_schematic.png)

SCOPE schematic

## Installation

Install `SCOPE.CTN` from GitHub:

``` r

install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("YufanWu147/SCOPE.CTN")
```

## Resources

Documentation and tutorials can be found at
<https://yufanwu147.github.io/SCOPE.CTN/>. Specifically,

- [Documentation](https://yufanwu147.github.io/SCOPE.CTN/reference/index.html)
- [Tutorials](https://yufanwu147.github.io/SCOPE.CTN/articles/)

# Package index

## All functions

- [`Build_cell_neighbor_maxdist()`](https://github.com/YufanWu147/SCOPE.CTN/reference/Build_cell_neighbor_maxdist.md)
  : Construct neighborhood cell type count and proportion matrices
- [`CLQ_permutation_test()`](https://github.com/YufanWu147/SCOPE.CTN/reference/CLQ_permutation_test.md)
  : Compute colocation quotient (CLQ) on permutated data
- [`CTN_annotate()`](https://github.com/YufanWu147/SCOPE.CTN/reference/CTN_annotate.md)
  : Rename consolidated CTNs based on dominant cell types
- [`CTN_presence_coxph()`](https://github.com/YufanWu147/SCOPE.CTN/reference/CTN_presence_coxph.md)
  : Cox regression on patient survival based on CTN presence
- [`color_CTN_names()`](https://github.com/YufanWu147/SCOPE.CTN/reference/color_CTN_names.md)
  : Separating cell types in CTN labels with colored dots
- [`compute_CLQ_observed()`](https://github.com/YufanWu147/SCOPE.CTN/reference/compute_CLQ_observed.md)
  : Compute observed colocation quotient (CLQ)
- [`compute_CLQ_permuted()`](https://github.com/YufanWu147/SCOPE.CTN/reference/compute_CLQ_permuted.md)
  : Compute colocation quotient (CLQ) on permuted data
- [`draw_CTN_celltype()`](https://github.com/YufanWu147/SCOPE.CTN/reference/draw_CTN_celltype.md)
  : Spatial Visualization of CTNs and Cell Types
- [`draw_CTN_celltype_prop()`](https://github.com/YufanWu147/SCOPE.CTN/reference/draw_CTN_celltype_prop.md)
  : CTN cell type proportion dotplot
- [`draw_CTN_coxph_logHR()`](https://github.com/YufanWu147/SCOPE.CTN/reference/draw_CTN_coxph_logHR.md)
  : Plot Cox regression results on patient-level CTN presence
- [`draw_CTN_dendro()`](https://github.com/YufanWu147/SCOPE.CTN/reference/draw_CTN_dendro.md)
  : Draw CTN dendrogram
- [`draw_CTN_umap()`](https://github.com/YufanWu147/SCOPE.CTN/reference/draw_CTN_umap.md)
  : Visualize CTN cell type composition similarity using UMAP
- [`draw_htmap_jaccard_index()`](https://github.com/YufanWu147/SCOPE.CTN/reference/draw_htmap_jaccard_index.md)
  : Jaccard similarity index heatmap
- [`draw_silhoutte_score()`](https://github.com/YufanWu147/SCOPE.CTN/reference/draw_silhoutte_score.md)
  : Visualize silhouette score
- [`jaccard()`](https://github.com/YufanWu147/SCOPE.CTN/reference/jaccard.md)
  : Compute Jaccard similarity index
- [`jaccard_dist_hclust()`](https://github.com/YufanWu147/SCOPE.CTN/reference/jaccard_dist_hclust.md)
  : Perform hierarchical clustering on Jaccard distance
- [`run_SCOPE()`](https://github.com/YufanWu147/SCOPE.CTN/reference/run_SCOPE.md)
  : Multi-view cell type triad niche screening
- [`run_SCOPE_subcluster()`](https://github.com/YufanWu147/SCOPE.CTN/reference/run_SCOPE_subcluster.md)
  : Subclustering cells labeled as "CTN" in initial analysis

# Articles

### All vignettes

- [Detecting lymphocyte aggregate-like niches in CRC VisiumHD
  data](https://github.com/YufanWu147/SCOPE.CTN/articles/CRC_VisiumHD.md):
- [Systematic CTN screening in HGSOC CosMx
  data](https://github.com/YufanWu147/SCOPE.CTN/articles/HGSOC_CosMx.md):
- [Systematic CTN screening in NSCLC IMC
  data](https://github.com/YufanWu147/SCOPE.CTN/articles/NSCLC_IMC.md):
- [Detecting TLS-like CTNs in PF Xenium
  data](https://github.com/YufanWu147/SCOPE.CTN/articles/PF_Xenium.md):
- [Prefiltering cell type triads using CLQ permutation
  test](https://github.com/YufanWu147/SCOPE.CTN/articles/Triad_prefilter_CLQ.md):
